name: UBA : ShellBags Modified By Ransomware
notes: Detects ShellBag registry modifications that indicate typical malware or ransomware behavior.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000844) Success Audit: A registry value was modified
when an event matches any of the following UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event matches RegistryObject (custom) contains any of \Software\Microsoft\Windows\Shell
TD_list: APPLY UBA : ShellBags Modified By Ransomware on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000844) Success Audit: A registry value was modified
AND when an event matches any of the following UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event matches RegistryObject (custom) contains any of \Software\Microsoft\Windows\Shell
RED_list: Event name: UBA : ShellBags Modified By Ransomware
